results.title: Universal Music Group (OTCMKTS:UMGNF) Sees Large Drop in Short Interest
results.description: Universal Music Group (OTCMKTS:UMGNF – Get Free Report) saw a large decline in short interest during the month of May. As of May 29th, there was short interest totaling 5,283,578 shares, a decline of 43.8% from the May 14th total of 9,404,358 shares.
